title: SHARDOR Automatic Coffee Grinder, Electric Burr Coffee Grinder with 18 Precise Grind Setting, Adjustable Coffee Bean Grinder for 2-12 Cup, Grinders for Home Use for French Press, Drip and Espresso
description:
About this item
UNIFORM GRINDING: Metallic flat burr coffee grinder deliver different grind size, and use abrasive surfaces to crush and grind the beans into uniform particles. The result is a more even extraction and better-tasting coffee overall
LARGE-CAPACITY BEAN HOPPER: The large bean hopper of the coffee grinder electric can hold 8.82oz coffee beans, this will allow you to grind enough beans in one go without having to refill the grinder repeatedly
18 GRIND PRESETS: The coffee bean grinder offers 18 grind size settings, achieving a uniform grind from coarse to fine for rich flavor. You can choose a grind setting for different tastes and styles according to your favourites
CUSTOMIZABLE CUPS: The espresso bean grinder can make 2-12cups of ground coffee at once, allowing you to grind what you need, and you can make fresh coffee anytime
USTOMIZABLE CUPS: The espresso bean grinder can make 2-12cups of ground coffee at once, allowing you to grind what you need, and you can make fresh coffee anytime
EASY TO CLEAN: Bean hopper, grind chamber and grinding burr of the coffee grinders for home use can be easily removed for cleaning at any time
AFTER-SALES SERVICE: SHARDOR has a professional after-sales service team, who provide 2-year service. Just try it risk-free! In the unlikely event that you don’t satisfied, we will offer you a solution that satisfies you
reviews_5s:
I have had a typical bladed coffee grinder for years, and never really thought much about it.
However, since I really love coffee, and different varieties, I decided to get a good grinder.

Wow, I feel like I have been missing out for years.
The old grinder does what it is supposed to, grinds the coffee, but for some reason it absolutely does not bring out the full flavor.

We pulled out some of my favorite beans for testing, and the burr grinder does such a great job.
It smells amazing as it grinds, which the old bladed grinder really never did, so I could tell this was going to be much better.

The coffee maker I am using is one that has pods you can fill with your own coffee, and it makes it with a nice crema on top, so it really brings out the flavors of the coffee.

I can't imaging going back to the plain old bladed grinder after this.

It looks really nice.
It has so many settings, you can grind for whatever type of coffee maker you use, from pour over, to espresso maker.
The hopper holds a good amount of beans, so you don't have to fill it very often, and you can grind as few as 2 cups worth at once, which is perfect.

I really love this grinder and am super happy I got it.The SHARDOR Automatic Coffee Grinder has completely elevated my coffee-making experience! The 18 precise grind settings make it incredibly versatile—I can easily switch between coarse grinds for French press, medium for drip coffee, and fine for espresso. The grinder is powerful yet quiet, and the adjustable grind size ensures consistent results every time.
I also love the 2-12 cup capacity setting, which is perfect whether I’m making a single cup for myself or brewing for a group. The design is sleek and compact, fitting perfectly on my kitchen counter without taking up too much space. Cleaning is easy, and the durable build feels like it will last for years. For anyone serious about their coffee, this grinder is a must-have!- I really like this grinder. It has lots of options for type of grind but is simple and easy to use. It doesn't overwhelm with too many dials, buttons, etc.

- The hopper is a really good size. I don't have to keep emptying and filling the machine just to get enough for a pot of coffee. I can even grind enough for the weekdays ahead of time.

- There was no mess while grinding. A little bit escaped while I was emptying the grounds; but that was on me for not taking a bit more care.

- It doesn't take up much counter space being smaller than most blenders. This also makes it easy to store.

- It's perfect for me because I want something that works and is strong but I don't need bulky commercial grade equipment with functions I will never use for it.My family members (even the kids) are coffee lovers, and we are picky about our beans and the process of making our coffees. We ordered this SHARDOR burr grinder for our second home, and it works well enough to earn 5 stars. This doesn’t compare with the expensive and fancy grinder we use at our main house, in terms of ground coffee uniformity or consistency. However, this device is priced at less than ¼ of the other one and delivers over 90% of the performance. Seriously, even my picky coffee loving family cannot taste the difference between the coffee made from the two grinders.It's been a very long time since I ground my own coffee beans and this grinder makes my whole coffee experience enjoyable. Highly functional and excellent value. Has excellent grind speed and has plenty of adjustment available for the coarseness I need for all different types of coffee such as drip, French press, espresso and moka pot.comes with a scoop and cleaning brush. Easy disassembly and easy to clean. Noise level is acceptable and not obnoxious to run first thing every morning.I really like this coffee grinder. I bring home coffee beans from the Philippines, where my brother-in-law grows coffee. I roast it, and then with this grinder I can adjust the coffee grinds to any size I like.
You can load it with almost 9 ounces of beans, and grind just the amount you need each morning.
Nice machine, and very decorative with the unground beans on top.This coffee grinder is so quiet! With my 10 year old electric burr grinder, I can wake the whole house grinding beans for our morning elixir. As far as electric grinders go, this one purrs. It did an excellent job with both the finest grind on the dial for espresso, and on medium grind for drip coffee (which are the only two I ever use.) The enclosed manual is clearly written and gives all the info one needs to operate the grinder. The hopper and burr are easily removed for cleaning, with a brush/coffee scoop combo included to make the job easier. It’s sleek design looks sweet on the counter, but the footprint is small enough that it will tuck into a relatively small amount of cabinet space.
